findings.title: Add coverage for transactional dynamic sampler flag updates
findings.impact: The new datasystem.config path validates and commits request/access/diagnostic sample-rate flags as a batch, mutates global gflags, rolls them back on failure, and then publishes the LogSampler config. The added tests cover LogSampler::UpdateConfigFromFlags directly, but not this Flags::UpdateFlagParameter transaction path, so regressions such as partial commits after an invalid mixed update or a sampler snapshot diverging from FLAGS_* would not be caught.
findings.fix: Add Flags-level tests that call UpdateFlagParameter/ProcessFlagFile with sampler entries: a valid request-only update that proves derived access/diagnostic rates are published, a valid explicit access/diagnostic batch, and an invalid batch where one sampler value is out of range and all FLAGS_* values plus LogSampler's previous-good snapshot remain unchanged.
